hero.location: São Paulo, Brazil · Hybrid or Remote

about.title: About me
about.subtitle: Front-end developer passionate about creating high-quality digital experiences.
about.paragraph1: I'm a front-end developer with over 3 years of experience building fast, accessible, and scalable interfaces. I primarily work in the React + TypeScript ecosystem, focusing on B2B SaaS, AIoT, and smart cities solutions.
about.paragraph2: At Group Link One, I contribute to building real-time monitoring platforms for smart cities, integrating IoT devices with modern dashboards and interactive maps.
about.paragraph3: Beyond code, I'm interested in frontend architecture, developer experience, and building a culture of quality within the team.
about.availabilityText: Open to full-time or freelance opportunities · Hybrid or Remote
